Task.Name: AI Agent Server Rack Build
PLAN-01 Define project scope and AI workload requirements
Task.Notes: Scope doc approved. AI workload defined as: multi-agent orchestration (LangGraph), local LLM inference (Ollama/vLLM), vector search (Qdrant), and Claude API gateway. Peak concurrent load estimated at 50 agents.

Task.Name: PLAN-02 Identify server hardware requirements and specs
Task.Notes: Spec sheet finalized: 4x nodes, dual Xeon Scalable, 512GB DDR5 per node, 8x NVMe SSD per node, 2x NVIDIA A100 80GB per node. Rack: 42U APC NetShelter. UPS: APC Smart-UPS 10kVA.

Task.Name: PLAN-03 Define networking and connectivity requirements
Task.Notes: Network design: 3 VLANs (MGMT/10.0.0.0/24, DATA/10.1.0.0/24, AI/10.2.0.0/24). 25GbE intra-rack, 10GbE uplink. Cisco Catalyst 9300 top-of-rack switch selected.

Task.Name: PLAN-04 Document security and compliance requirements
Task.Notes: Security baseline: CIS Level 2 Ubuntu, k8s Pod Security Admission, Vault for secrets, TLS everywhere, SIEM via Wazuh. No PII data on this rack — AI workloads only.

Task.Name: PLAN-05 Create initial project schedule and WBS
PLAN-06 Identify vendors and solicit competitive quotes
Task.Notes: Shortlisted: Dell Technologies (servers), CDW (networking), Eaton/APC (power). GPU sourced directly from NVIDIA partner channel. Lead times: servers 3-4 weeks, GPUs 6-8 weeks.

Task.Name: PLAN-07 Finalize hardware and software bill of materials
MILESTONE: Project Kickoff
PROC-01 Issue PO for server chassis and rack enclosure
PROC-02 Issue PO for CPUs, motherboards, and cooling
PROC-03 Issue PO for RAM modules and NVMe storage
PROC-04 Issue PO for GPU accelerator cards (A100)
Task.Notes: BLOCKER resolved: GPU allocation confirmed through NVIDIA partner — 8x A100 80GB SXM4 secured. Lead time 6 weeks.

Task.Name: PROC-05 Issue PO for network switches and cabling
PROC-06 Issue PO for UPS and power distribution units
PROC-07 Track vendor order confirmations and hardware lead times
PROC-08 Track networking and power gear delivery status
PROC-09 Receive and inspect server chassis and rack
PROC-10 Receive and inspect compute components (CPUs, RAM, NVMe)
PROC-11 Receive and inspect GPU accelerator cards
PROC-12 Receive and inspect networking gear and PDU
MILESTONE: Procurement Complete
FAC-01 Survey data center rack location and clearances
FAC-02 Run and label dedicated power circuits to rack
FAC-03 Run and label Ethernet and fiber cabling to rack
FAC-04 Install cable management trays and patch panels
FAC-05 Verify HVAC cooling capacity and airflow for rack
FAC-06 Verify physical security, locks, and access control
MILESTONE: Facility Ready
HW-01 Mount server chassis and blanking panels in rack
HW-02 Install CPUs and liquid cooling assemblies
HW-03 Install DDR5 RAM in all server nodes
HW-04 Install NVMe drives in all server nodes
HW-05 Install NVIDIA A100 GPU accelerator cards
Task.Notes: GPU risers installed and torqued to spec. PCIe x16 slot verification passed on all 4 nodes. NVLink bridges installed on nodes 1 and 2.

Task.Name: HW-06 Install 25GbE network interface cards in all nodes
HW-07 Cable servers to top-of-rack Cisco 9300 switch
HW-08 Mount UPS and connect to rack PDU
HW-09 Connect rack PDU to facility power circuits
HW-10 Execute power-on self-test (POST) on all nodes
Task.Notes: POST passed on all 4 nodes. BIOS updated to latest firmware. IPMI/iDRAC configured on management VLAN. Node 3 had a loose RAM slot — reseated and cleared.

Task.Name: HW-11 Validate inter-node and switch connectivity
HW-12 Document final hardware build of materials (BOM)
HW-13 Photograph and label all rack installations
MILESTONE: Hardware Installed
SW-01 Prepare bootable USB installers for all nodes
SW-02 Install Ubuntu Server 22.04 LTS on all 4 nodes
SW-03 Configure static IP addressing, hostnames, and DNS
SW-04 Harden SSH config and disable root/password login
SW-05 Partition and format NVMe storage volumes
SW-06 Configure ZFS storage pools across all nodes
SW-07 Install Docker Engine and Containerd runtime
SW-08 Bootstrap Kubernetes cluster with kubeadm
SW-09 Deploy Cilium CNI cluster networking plugin
SW-10 Deploy Prometheus and Grafana cluster monitoring
Task.Notes: Prometheus stack deployed via kube-prometheus-stack helm chart. Node exporter running on all nodes, GPU metrics exporter installed. Grafana dashboards: 80% — still building out the per-GPU memory/utilization panels.

Task.Name: SW-11 Deploy Loki log aggregation and Fluentd DaemonSet
Task.Notes: Fluentd DaemonSet collecting container and system logs. Loki running as StatefulSet. S3-compatible backend (MinIO) configured for long-term retention. All 4 nodes shipping logs.

Task.Name: SW-12 Document OS configuration and base stack runbook
MILESTONE: OS and Base Stack Live
AI-01 Deploy Ollama inference engine on GPU nodes
Task.Notes: Ollama running on both GPU nodes. CUDA 12.2 drivers stable. Serving Llama-3 70B and Mistral 7B locally. Throughput: ~40 tokens/sec on A100 for 70B model.

Task.Name: AI-02 Set up Harbor private container and model registry
Task.Notes: Harbor deployed as k8s StatefulSet with TLS. Integrated with robot accounts for CI pull. All AI service images now sourced from internal registry.

Task.Name: AI-03 Pull, benchmark, and validate foundation LLM models
Task.Notes: Llama-3 70B, Mistral 7B, Phi-3-Medium, and Qwen2-72B all pulled and benchmarked. MMLU and HumanEval baselines recorded. Qwen2-72B fastest for code tasks.

Task.Name: AI-04 Deploy LangGraph agent orchestration API service
Task.Notes: LangGraph StateGraph-based API deployed as k8s Deployment (3 replicas). Tool-calling schema finalized. Redis-backed checkpoint memory integrated. Basic multi-step agent flows working end-to-end.

Task.Name: AI-05 Deploy Qdrant vector database (StatefulSet)
Task.Notes: Qdrant 1.9 deployed as k8s StatefulSet with persistent ZFS volumes. Three initial collections created: code_snippets, docs, agent_memory. gRPC API enabled.

Task.Name: AI-06 Configure AI agent orchestration and routing layer
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Agent supervisor graph 85% complete — the multi-agent handoff logic works for the two-agent case but breaks under 3+ concurrent sub-agents. Investigating LangGraph async edge routing. Expect resolution this week.

Task.Name: AI-07 Deploy Claude API gateway proxy with rate limiting
Task.Notes: Gateway proxy deployed. Rate limiting logic in place. Still working on the response caching layer — semantic cache using Qdrant is 60% wired up.

Task.Name: AI-08 End-to-end inference pipeline integration test
AI-09 Tune GPU memory allocation and batch size parameters
AI-10 Deploy model versioning and automated rollback tooling
AI-11 Document AI stack architecture and API contracts
Task.Notes: Architecture diagram and high-level design complete. API contract (OpenAPI spec) drafted for LangGraph and Claude gateway. Model registry docs 40% done — waiting for final model list to stabilize.

Task.Name: AI-12 Security scan all AI container images with Trivy
MILESTONE: AI Stack Deployed
NET-01 Configure VLANs for management, data, and AI networks
NET-02 Configure firewall rules and ACLs on Cisco 9300
NET-03 Deploy Suricata IDS on AI and data network segments
NET-04 Set up WireGuard VPN gateway for remote admin access
NET-05 Harden Kubernetes RBAC and network policies
NET-06 Deploy HashiCorp Vault for secrets management
NET-07 Configure TLS certificates for all exposed services
NET-08 Run full vulnerability scan (Trivy and Nessus)
NET-09 Remediate all critical and high vulnerability findings
NET-10 Configure centralized syslog and Wazuh SIEM
NET-11 Conduct external penetration test (red team)
NET-12 Configure network bandwidth monitoring and alerts
NET-13 Configure AI inference traffic load balancing
NET-14 Document network topology and security controls
NET-15 Formal security review and sign-off
MILESTONE: Network and Security Hardened
DOC-01 Write system administration runbook
DOC-02 Write AI stack operations and troubleshooting guide
DOC-03 Write hardware maintenance and parts replacement guide
Task.Notes: Hardware maintenance guide complete. Includes: RAM/NVMe hot-swap procedures, GPU removal/re-seat steps, UPS battery replacement schedule, and rack torque specs.

Task.Name: DOC-04 Write disaster recovery and failback plan
DOC-05 Write capacity planning and growth projection doc
DOC-06 Document monitoring dashboards and alert runbooks
DOC-07 Write AI services user onboarding guide
DOC-08 Final documentation review and sign-off
TEST-01 Develop system acceptance test plan
TEST-02 Execute hardware burn-in and stress tests
TEST-03 Execute AI inference load and performance tests
TEST-04 Execute network throughput and latency tests
TEST-05 Execute failover and disaster recovery tests
TEST-06 Execute security acceptance tests
TEST-07 Document test results and prepare acceptance report
MILESTONE: System Accepted
